name: Second Street Mixed-Use Tower
description: 18-story mixed-use tower with 210 residential units and 28000 sqft of ground-floor retail. Includes structured parking garage with 320 spaces and rooftop amenity deck.

name: Uptown Dallas Financial Center
description: 14-story Class A office building totaling 275000 sqft with LEED Gold certification. Features sky lobby on floor 7 full-floor conference center and 4-level underground parking.

name: Brickell Bay Luxury Hotel
description: 32-story luxury hotel with 420 guest rooms and suites. Includes full-service spa rooftop infinity pool multiple F&B outlets and 40000 sqft of ballroom and meeting space.

name: Aurora Commerce Park - Building A
description: Class A industrial warehouse and distribution center totaling 425000 sqft. 36-foot clear height ESFR fire suppression 68 dock doors and 6 drive-in doors. LEED Silver targeted.

name: Northside Medical Arts Campus
description: Five-building healthcare campus totaling 380000 sqft including 200-bed inpatient hospital medical office building cancer center and outpatient surgery center. Seismic design and FGI compliance.
